_notes: Sortlist: JS infinite-scroll — URL pagination does not work. pages=1 only (scrapes ~20 top agencies). Requires minimal headers (no Sec-Fetch-*) to avoid bot detection.
Sortlist URL prefix: Nordic countries (NO/SE/DK/FI) use no prefix. UK/FR/DE use /s/ prefix. ES uses /i/ prefix for web-design, /s/ for web-development.
Clutch: Cloudflare WAF blocks all requests with 403. Removed from all countries.
GoodFirms: WAF drops connection after ~20s timeout. Removed from all countries.
DesignRush: supports ?page=N pagination. 404 = no more pages — set pages high, scraper stops on 404.
FR extra directories checked: agences.io, lannuaire.digital, pagesjaunes.fr, jesuisnumerique.fr — all JS-rendered or list individuals, not agency sites. DesignRush is the only viable 2nd source.
